failed_criteria.title: ISSUE_008a: Identifies missing California state tax analysis for California-resident shareholders
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the report identifies that the memorandum fails to analyze California-specific tax consequences for the two California-resident shareholders, including at least one of the following: California's 1.5% entity-level S corporation tax, gain pass-through apportionment to California, or the risk that if Prism's S election were found invalid, California would retroactively impose C corporation taxes. FAIL if the report does not flag any missing California shareholder tax analysis.

failed_criteria.title: ISSUE_008b: Notes California retroactive C corp tax risk if S election invalid
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the report notes the risk that if Prism's S election were found invalid, California could retroactively impose C corporation taxes. FAIL if this specific California retroactive risk is not mentioned.
